comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Resuming: fix behave failures (daemon empty response socket dir, dotfile path scenario), rerun behave and coverage, close remaining gaps, then run quality gates and CI.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Starting full stabilization: rerun coverage and tests, fix remaining failures, then run quality gates, commit, push, and monitor CI.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: All Python and Rust tests pass; behave and cargo tests green; ruff/black/clippy/fmt green; CI passes in GitHub Actions.
custom.beads_close_reason: Stale/obsolete issue per user; no longer relevant.
custom.beads_notes: Scope: fix discovery and migration scenario failures, fix IssueCreationError handling in CLI/project config loading, align ID formatting, ensure list output parity, run quality gates, commit and push.
